productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Black Wedges
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these classy sandals  from carlton london. The comfy straps and soft tone make this wedge heel slipper a perfect buy. Heel: 2.5" Upper Supple synthetic straps in a tie-up style with a toe separator Synthetic leather ergonomically curved footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable PU outsole with leaf shaped grooves for grip Wedge heel for style and comfort Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
